subject: EER files do not update with recursive search in Warp 1.1.0 Beta
body:
Hi all,

love the new Ukraine themed Warp Version, but it's giving me some 
problems with EER files from FalconIV/EPU.

When I'm using recursive processing with EPUs GridSquare*/Data/*eer 
format it finds initial images and processes them fine when pointed to 
the Images-Disc1 folder. However, the file list is not updating although 
new images keep flying in. When I stop processing and refresh the folder 
manually it finds the new images. My processing folder is different from 
my data folder.

When I untick the "Search recursively" option and go to the 
Gridsquare*/Data/ folder it keeps updating and works fine on-the-fly.

Of course this can be fixed with some quick linux mv commands, but I 
still wanted to report it.

Cheers,

Dan

-- 
Dr. Daniel Mann

Forschungszentrum Jülich GmbH
Ernst-Ruska Centre for Microscopy and Spectroscopy with Electrons / ER-C-3 Structural Biology
Institute for Biological Information Processing / IBI-6 Cellular Structural Biology
Wilhem-Johnen-Straße, 52425 Jülich, Germany
